author: yhny1001
description: Memory compression for TauriTavern. Detects agent runtime via the agent-system extension-store flag (agentModeEnabled) — markers are not visible in the frontend chat array. Agent mode injects a chunked retrieval protocol (snippet-first via chat_search; fall back to chat_read_messages with small max_chars 2-3k ranges, never >= 8000). Chat mode keeps pre-grep + sentinel fallback.
